hooks.command: echo '--- ai-meta memory status ---' && echo 'Inbox entries:' && find memory/inbox -name '*.md' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo 'Latest compaction:' && ls -t memory/compactions/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo 'none' && echo 'Open ai-task issues:' && (gh issue list --repo noetl/ai-meta --state open --label ai-task --limit 5 --json number,title --template '{{range .}}#{{.number}} {{.title}}{{"\n"}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/  /' || echo '  (gh not available or no issues)') && echo 'Submodule state:' && git submodule status --recursive 2>/dev/null | head -5
